outreach_type.description: Flow that produced these messages. 'standard' = offer-based (job-application-tailor). 'cold' = speculative / cold-call (job-cold-prospect). Optional for backwards compatibility; defaults to 'standard' when absent.

target_role.description: For the cold flow: the selected_role.title the outreach is anchored on. Carried into the dossier and the run summary for audit. Omitted for the standard (offer-based) flow.
